commands: for d in /home/ec2-user/true-blue-platform /home/ec2-user/app /opt/true-blue-platform; do if [ -f "$d/docker-compose.prod.yml" ]; then echo COMPOSE_DIR=$d; cd "$d"; grep -E "^(APP_IMAGE|MIGRATE_IMAGE|WORKER_IMAGE|NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL|ENABLE_AI_CHAT|ENABLE_VECTOR_RETRIEVAL)=" .env || true; docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml ps; fi; done
